summary: Start M7 manual Beta playthrough evidence collection after M7 platform/resolution/localization matrix closure entered origin/main. The writer must collect evidence only and must not autonomously approve human-judgment playthrough acceptance.

tests_run.result: On codex/m7-manual-playthrough-evidence with no local file changes before start registration.
M7-MANUAL-PLAYTHROUGH-EVIDENCE-001 and M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 are dependency-ready; lead selected manual playthrough evidence first because it is listed first and uses test_engineer ownership.

decisions: Start the highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task selected by taskctl ready.
Manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required remains a Human Gate; this task records and routes evidence rather than approving it autonomously.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and no active Human Gate.

No product code, content data, balance tuning, UI fix, save migration, release artifact, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, branding, commercial decision, or manual node battle work is authorized.
risks: Manual playthrough evidence may identify a Human Gate need; if so the writer must record BLOCKED/Human Gate evidence rather than infer approval.
Evidence task allowed paths are process/state/message only; any product defect fix must become a separate task after review.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 must later carry or resolve unresolved Edge/Firefox and Windows DPI 150% rows from the platform matrix.
requested_action: Collect Beta manual playthrough evidence, run required commands, and write writer REVIEW handoff for qa_reviewer without autonomously approving human-gated acceptance.
